arts.ttl: Liam Manning makes Bristol City 'success' point in new play-off verdict ahead of Burnley clash
arts.sum: Liam Manning admits that while he wants to secure a place in the Championship play-off places this season, it won't take a top six finish for this season to be a "success" for Bristol City . Liam Manning makes Bristol City'success' point in new play-off verdict ahead of Burnley clash

arts.ttl: Saturday's Championship predictions including Burnley vs. Bristol City
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Burnley vs. Bristol City.

arts.ttl: Burnley v Bristol City: Team news, predicted teams and TV details as Clarets resume promotion charge
arts.sum: Burnley resume their promotion charge when they take on Bristol City today on their return from the international break.

arts.ttl: Bristol City fans share their thoughts on season so far, Nahki Wells' future and play-off hopes
arts.sum: We have now arrived at the business end of the season and for the first time in a number of years, Bristol City are heading into the final weeks of the campaign with something still to play for. Liam Manning's side find themselves level on points with sixth-placed West Brom, only outside the play-off places on goal difference, with just eight matches of the regular season remaining.

arts.ttl: Burnley FC: Status of Preston North End's Milutin Osmajic's Hannibal race row following FA charge
arts.sum: Preston North End’s Milutin Osmajic has been granted more time to respond to his FA charge.

arts.ttl: Burnley's Aaron Ramsey plays first football in 13 months with Under-21 action after injury lay-off
arts.sum: Aaron Ramsey has played his first football in over 13 months by featuring for Burnley’s Under-21 side.

arts.ttl: Scott Twine: Bristol City man on Burnley return, Scott Parker impact and Premier League ambition
arts.sum: City, and Manning, were eager to bring the attacking midfielder back to Ashton Gate permanently throughout the off-season, but on the opening weekend of the campaign, the 25-year-old was an unused substitute as Parker's side beat Luton Town 4-1 at Turf Moor. Ultimately, the former MK Dons man got his move to Ashton Gate a matter of days later and though he never played a minute of competitive football under Parker, the former England international left a good impression on Twine.

arts.ttl: Championship market value update: Jobe Bellingham new league MVP, CJ Egan-Riley biggest winner
arts.sum: Transfermarkt has adjusted the market values of 76 players in the latest Championship market value update. Remarkably, the English second-flight is the sixth most valuable league in world...

arts.ttl: Scott Parker assesses Lucas Pires' Burnley performances after stepping in for Chelsea loanee
arts.sum: Scott Parker has been impressed with the way Lucas Pires has stepped up to the plate in Bashir Humphreys’ absence.

arts.ttl: Bristol City's Scott Twine opens up on Turf Moor return as ex-Burnley man quashes 'grudge' talk
arts.sum: Scott Twine insists he holds no grudges as he prepares to make his return to Burnley with his new club Bristol City.
